title: Der Draufgänger
writer: Franz Höllering, Joseph Than, Richard Eichberg
actors: Hans Albers, Sigurd Lohde, Ernst Stahl-Nachbaur
plot: Harbour policeman Hans and his companion rescue a young woman from water during their night watch, to find out she is connected with a jewel robbery in which a gangster now owner of an hippodrome, an out jailed one and his mistres...
